email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Office manager in Antwerpen centrum. Uw oproep voor een polyvalente, gestructureerde en servicegerichte medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto combineer ik administratieve nauwkeurigheid met digitale affiniteit. Ik coördineer content, beheer websites en ondersteun teams — vaardigheden die direct toepasbaar zijn in office management. Daarnaast heb ik via eerdere functies bij Katoen Natie en ViviDoctor ervaring opgedaan in logistiek, front-end ontwikkeling en het ondersteunen van operationele processen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik ben gewend aan internationale omgevingen en werk gestructureerd, proactief en flexibel.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Office manager position in Antwerp center. Your call for a versatile, structured, and service-oriented employee aligns perfectly with my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I combine administrative accuracy with digital affinity. I coordinate content, manage websites, and support teams — skills directly applicable to office management. Additionally, through previous roles at Katoen Natie and ViviDoctor, I gained experience in logistics, front-end development, and supporting operational processes.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I am used to international environments and work in a structured, proactive, and flexible manner.

I look forward to further explaining my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

cv_highlights:
Polyvalente ervaring: digitale marketing, logistiek, front-end ontwikkeling — allemaal met administratieve en coördinerende taken.
Digitale affiniteit: MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, WordPress, Google Analytics, SEMrush.
Tweetalig Engels/Turks, Nederlands B1 (in opleiding) — geschikt voor internationale omgeving.
Gestructureerd en nauwkeurig: ervaring met contentbeheer, website-onderhoud en logistieke processen.
Proactief en flexibel: gewend aan dynamische, groeiende organisaties en snelle omschakelingen.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Office & administration: coordination, planning, supplier management, facility support, HR administration (onboarding/offboarding), travel & event organization
- Digital affinity: MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, WordPress, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Communication: professional writing (reports, notes), multilingual (English professional, Turkish native, Dutch B1)
- Structured & accurate: content management, website maintenance, logistics processes
- Proactive & flexible: experience in dynamic, international environments

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
